Q1.correction: Preserve hit. Exact option requires simultaneous coverage of private-enterprise executive role, stable income, and independent shop/trading activity; generic self-employment or ordinary employment is insufficient.

Q3.correction: Preserve hit. Marriage-year comparison must keep 2016, 2017, 2021, 2022 as neutral candidates and require legal-marriage endpoint; activation alone is not marriage.

Q4.correction: Preserve hit but retain compound burden: legally married, three live children, and two miscarriages are separate endpoints; chart symbolism cannot formally prove counts or miscarriage history.
